name: Philipsburg Golf Club
address: 1140 Sunshine Rd Suite G, Philipsburg, MT 59858
about: Philipsburg Golf Club features a Trackman iO golf simulator located at The Depot in Philipsburg, MT. The venue is open daily from 5:00 AM to midnight, 365 days a year, offering flexible hours for players. The club is powered by Trackman technology, providing a high-end simulation experience. It is accessible for booking through a dedicated online platform. The club provides a convenient location with address details available for easy access.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by industry-leading Trackman technology for accurate shot data
Open 365 days a year with flexible hours from 5:00 AM to midnight
Convenient online booking system for bay time reservations

faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience.

faq.answer: The venue offers food and drink options, but external policies are not specified.

faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on player speed and simulator usage.

faq.answer: Yes, Philipsburg Golf Club is open to families and offers a welcoming environment.
